g.text: fib(n) makes 2 calls -> each makes 2 more -> tree explodes

g.text: At depth n, total nodes = 2^n. For n=40 that is 1 trillion calls. Always use memoization.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: With memoization: each value computed ONCE -> O(n) instead of O(2^n)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Store result in a dict. If already computed, return instantly. This is the core idea of DP.
